title: False Impulse To Study.
content:
Oh, how many new foes against truth! My very soul bleedeth
    When I behold the owl-race now bursting forth to the light.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "False Impulse To Study.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
